data.body: REBASE + RE-PUSH complete. Rebased 6-change stack onto current origin/main (b3a65ce2d), fixing the 264f CI failure (scripts/check_docs_index.py now present). Post-rebase suite found 11 fails: 10 real doc-gen drift (9 gen_cli_reference INTERCEPT_COMMANDS/_LADDER needing 'identity' registered + regenerated docs/cli-reference.md; 1 gen_mcp_reference needing regen for create_identity) + resolve_symbol flake. Fixed: added identity to INTERCEPT_COMMANDS (gen_cli_reference.py) + _LADDER (test drift-ledger) + regenerated cli/mcp reference docs, AMENDED INTO ddbe commit (via checkout+amend+rebase--onto since git rebase -i unavailable) so per-change CI passes. All doc-gen gates + docs-index + lint green at HEAD. Re-pushed: 558/560/561/563/576 updated + 2f13->new change 579. All 6 re-CIing. 2f13 needs Verified+1. Re-reviewing 3183 v2 vs new HEAD.
